samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal.</input>
        <input id="sign">Signed or unsigned operation.</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[15:0]">Input operand DIVIDEND.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[15:0]">Input operand DIVISOR.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">Valid operation request.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">The output has already been acknowledged.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">The 16-bit output result is valid.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Output result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="IDLE">0</param>
        <param id="SUB">1</param>
        <param id="SELECT">2</param>
        <param id="SHIFT">3</param>
        <param id="DONE">4</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[2:0]">
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <always>
                    <case>
                        <when id="state == RESET">
                            <assignment id="state" value="INIT"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == INIT">
                            <if>
                                <true id="opn_valid && !res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="state" value="SUB"/>
                                </true>
                                <true id="res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="state" value="RESET"/>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SUB">
                            <assignment id="state" value="SELECT"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SELECT">
                            <assignment id="state" value="SHIFT"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SHIFT">
                            <if>
                                <true id="cnt[3]">
                                    <assignment id="state" value="DONE"/>
                                </true>
                                <true id="!cnt[3]">
                                    <assignment id="state" value="SUB"/>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == DONE">
                            <assignment id="state" value="RESET"/>
                        </when>
                    </case>
                </always>
            </reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <always>
                    <case>
                        <when id="state == RESET">
                            <assignment id="cnt" value="0"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == INIT">
                            <if>
                                <true id="opn_valid && !res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="cnt" value="1"/>
                                </true>
                                <true id="res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="cnt" value="0"/>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SUB">
                            <assignment id="cnt" value="cnt + 1"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SHIFT">
                            <assignment id="cnt" value="cnt + 1"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == DONE">
                            <assignment id="cnt" value="0"/>
                        </assignment>
                    </case>
                </always>
            </reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="start_cnt">
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <always>
                    <case>
                        <when id="state == RESET">
                            <assignment id="start_cnt" value="0"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == INIT">
                            <if>
                                <true id="opn_valid && !res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="start_cnt" value="1"/>
                                </true>
                                <true id="res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="start_cnt" value="0"/>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == DONE">
                            <assignment id="start_cnt" value="0"/>
                        </when>
                    </case>
                </always>
            </reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="neg_divisor" width_description="[15:0]">
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <always>
                    <case>
                        <when id="state == RESET">
                            <assignment id="neg_divisor" value="0"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == INIT">
                            <if>
                                <true id="sign && opn_valid && !res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="neg_divisor" value="-divisor"/>
                                </true>
                                <true id="!sign && opn_valid && !res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="neg_divisor" value="0-divisor"/>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </when>
                    </case>
                </always>
            </reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="sr" width_description="[15:0]">
                <initial_value>0</initial_value>
                <always>
                    <case>
                        <when id="state == RESET">
                            <assignment id="sr" value="0"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == INIT">
                            <if>
                                <true id="opn_valid && !res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="sr" value="{dividend, 8'b0}"/>
                                </true>
                                <true id="res_valid">
                                    <assignment id="sr" value="0"/>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SUB">
                            <assignment id="sr" value="sub_result"/>
                        </when>
                        <when id="state == SHIFT">
                            <assignment id="sr" value="sr_shift"/>
                        </assignment>
                    </case>
                </always>
            </reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <wire id="sub_result" width_description="[15:0]"/>
            <sub id="sub_1" result="$signed(sr) + neg_divisor" r="$signed(sr) < 0"/>
            <mux id="mux_1">
                <input id="mux_input_1" value="sub_result"/>
                <input id="mux_input_0" value="sr"/>
                <select id="select_1" value="r"/>
                <output id="mux_output"/>
            </mux>
            <wire id="sr_shift" width_description="[15:0]"/>
            <concat id="concat_1">
                <add id="concat_add_1" value="mux_output[15:8]"/>
                <add id="concat_add_2" value="mux_output[7]"/>
                <output id="concat_output"/>
            </concat>
        </combinational_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The module performs division operation when opn_valid is high and the operation is not completed(res_valid is low).
    The inputs are stored and the shift register SR is initialized with the absolute value of the dividend shifted left by one bit.
    NEG_DIVISOR is set to the negated absolute value of the divisor.
    The counter cnt is set to 1 and start_cnt is set to 1 to begin the division process.
    If start_cnt is high, the module performs the following steps:
    If cnt is 8, the division is complete. The counter is cleared, and the result is stored in SR.
    Otherwise, the counter is incremented, and the SR is updated based on the subtraction result:
    The module subtracts NEG_DIVISOR from SR.
    The subtraction result is selected using a multiplexer.
    The SR is updated by shifting left and inserting the carry-out.
    When the operation is completed, the module sets res_valid to 1.
    When the output is ready to be consumed(res_ready is high), the module sets res_valid to 0.
    </implementation>
</module>
samples.sc_log:
TopModule.sv:32: error: 'mux_output' has already been declared in this scope.
TopModule.sv:13:      : It was declared here as a net.
